notes: Polymorphic support tables such as entity_tags and external_provider_ids deliberately use entity_type + entity_id instead of concrete foreign keys for every target entity.
The viewer below is generated from SQLAlchemy metadata, so columns, enums, indexes, foreign keys, unique constraints, and defaults stay aligned with the model layer.
For migration history and any constraints introduced outside model declarations, cross-check the Alembic revisions in alembic/versions.

domains.title: Catalog Spine
domains.description: Core catalog hierarchy, releases, bundle composition, and series-to-series catalog links.
domains.diagram:
erDiagram
  FRANCHISES {
    VARCHAR_255 name UK
    TEXT description
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  SERIES {
    UUID franchise_id FK
    item_kind kind
    VARCHAR_255 title
    VARCHAR_255 slug
    TEXT description
    VARCHAR_255 original_title
    DATE start_date
    DATE end_date
    VARCHAR_64 status
    VARCHAR_16 language
    VARCHAR_64 country
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  VOLUMES {
    UUID series_id FK
    VARCHAR_255 name
    INTEGER volume_number
    INTEGER start_year
    DATE start_date
    DATE end_date
    TEXT description
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  ITEMS {
    UUID volume_id FK
    item_kind kind
    VARCHAR_255 title
    VARCHAR_64 item_number
    VARCHAR_255 sort_key
    TEXT synopsis
    VARCHAR_64 release_type
    INTEGER season_number
    INTEGER episode_number
    INTEGER runtime_minutes
    INTEGER page_count
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  EDITIONS {
    UUID item_id FK
    VARCHAR_255 title
    VARCHAR_100 format
    VARCHAR_255 publisher
    VARCHAR_32 isbn
    VARCHAR_32 upc
    VARCHAR_16 language
    VARCHAR_32 region
    DATE release_date
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  VARIANTS {
    UUID edition_id FK
    VARCHAR_255 name
    VARCHAR_64 variant_type
    VARCHAR_100 sku
    VARCHAR_32 barcode
    VARCHAR_32 isbn
    VARCHAR_32 region
    VARCHAR_64 platform
    INTEGER cover_price_cents
    VARCHAR_3 currency
    VARCHAR_512 cover_image_key
    VARCHAR_1024 cover_image_url
    VARCHAR_512 thumbnail_image_key
    VARCHAR_1024 thumbnail_image_url
    TEXT description
    JSONB metadata_json
    BOOLEAN is_primary
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  BUNDLE_RELEASES {
    item_kind kind
    VARCHAR_255 title
    VARCHAR_64 bundle_type
    UUID franchise_id FK
    UUID series_id FK
    UUID volume_id FK
    UUID primary_item_id FK
    VARCHAR_64 format
    VARCHAR_64 variant_type
    VARCHAR_64 packaging_type
    VARCHAR_32 region
    VARCHAR_32 language
    VARCHAR_255 publisher
    VARCHAR_100 sku
    VARCHAR_32 barcode
    DATE release_date
    VARCHAR_512 cover_image_key
    VARCHAR_1024 cover_image_url
    VARCHAR_512 thumbnail_image_key
    VARCHAR_1024 thumbnail_image_url
    JSONB external_ids
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  BUNDLE_RELEASE_ITEMS {
    UUID bundle_release_id FK
    UUID item_id FK
    VARCHAR_32 role
    INTEGER sequence_number
    INTEGER disc_number
    VARCHAR_255 disc_label
    INTEGER quantity
    BOOLEAN is_primary
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  SERIES_RELATIONS {
    UUID source_series_id FK
    UUID target_series_id FK
    series_relation_type relation_type
    INTEGER ordinal
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  FRANCHISES o|--o{ SERIES : franchise_id
  SERIES ||--o{ VOLUMES : series_id
  VOLUMES o|--o{ ITEMS : volume_id
  ITEMS ||--o{ EDITIONS : item_id
  EDITIONS ||--o{ VARIANTS : edition_id
  FRANCHISES o|--o{ BUNDLE_RELEASES : franchise_id
  SERIES o|--o{ BUNDLE_RELEASES : series_id
  ITEMS o|--o{ BUNDLE_RELEASES : primary_item_id
  VOLUMES o|--o{ BUNDLE_RELEASES : volume_id
  BUNDLE_RELEASES ||--o{ BUNDLE_RELEASE_ITEMS : bundle_release_id
  ITEMS ||--o{ BUNDLE_RELEASE_ITEMS : item_id
  SERIES ||--o{ SERIES_RELATIONS : target_series_id
  SERIES ||--o{ SERIES_RELATIONS : source_series_id

domains.title: Editorial and Taxonomy
domains.description: People, organizations, characters, story arcs, and shared tagging tables.
domains.diagram:
erDiagram
  ORGANIZATIONS {
    VARCHAR_255 name
    VARCHAR_64 type
    VARCHAR_64 country
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  PERSONS {
    VARCHAR_255 name
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  ENTITY_ORGANIZATIONS {
    VARCHAR_64 entity_type
    UUID entity_id
    UUID organization_id FK
    VARCHAR_64 role
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  ENTITY_PERSONS {
    VARCHAR_64 entity_type
    UUID entity_id
    UUID person_id FK
    VARCHAR_64 role
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  STORY_ARCS {
    VARCHAR_255 name
    TEXT description
    VARCHAR_255 publisher
    DATE start_date
    DATE end_date
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  STORY_ARC_ITEMS {
    UUID story_arc_id FK
    UUID item_id FK
    INTEGER ordinal
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  CHARACTERS {
    VARCHAR_255 name UK
    JSONB aliases
    TEXT description
    VARCHAR_1024 image_url
    UUID first_appearance_item_id FK
    JSONB metadata_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  CHARACTER_APPEARANCES {
    UUID character_id FK
    UUID item_id FK
    VARCHAR_32 role
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  TAGS {
    VARCHAR_64 kind
    VARCHAR_255 name
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  ENTITY_TAGS {
    VARCHAR_64 entity_type
    UUID entity_id
    UUID tag_id FK
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  ORGANIZATIONS ||--o{ ENTITY_ORGANIZATIONS : organization_id
  PERSONS ||--o{ ENTITY_PERSONS : person_id
  STORY_ARCS ||--o{ STORY_ARC_ITEMS : story_arc_id
  CHARACTERS ||--o{ CHARACTER_APPEARANCES : character_id
  TAGS ||--o{ ENTITY_TAGS : tag_id

domains.title: Identity and Source Mapping
domains.description: Users and external provider identifiers that map upstream ids back to catalog entities.
domains.diagram:
erDiagram
  USERS {
    VARCHAR_320 email UK
    VARCHAR_120 display_name
    VARCHAR_255 password_hash
    BOOLEAN is_active
    BOOLEAN is_admin
    user_role role
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  EXTERNAL_PROVIDER_IDS {
    external_provider provider
    VARCHAR_255 provider_item_id
    VARCHAR_64 entity_type
    UUID entity_id
    VARCHAR_1024 site_url
    VARCHAR_1024 api_url
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }

domains.title: Images and Operations
domains.description: Image storage, cache tracking, ingest jobs, admin audit trails, and proposal workflow tables.
domains.diagram:
erDiagram
  IMAGE_ASSETS {
    VARCHAR_64 entity_type
    UUID entity_id
    VARCHAR_64 image_type
    VARCHAR_512 storage_key
    VARCHAR_512 thumbnail_storage_key
    VARCHAR_1024 source_url
    VARCHAR_64 provider
    TEXT attribution
    INTEGER width
    INTEGER height
    VARCHAR_128 phash
    BOOLEAN is_primary
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  IMAGE_CACHE_ENTRIES {
    VARCHAR_64 provider
    VARCHAR_255 provider_item_id
    VARCHAR_1024 source_url
    VARCHAR_512 object_key UK
    VARCHAR_1024 public_url
    VARCHAR_64 mime_type
    INTEGER size_bytes
    INTEGER width
    INTEGER height
    VARCHAR_128 content_hash
    INTEGER access_count
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE last_accessed_at
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  PROVIDER_INGEST_JOBS {
    external_provider provider
    VARCHAR_255 provider_item_id
    VARCHAR_32 status
    INTEGER attempts
    INTEGER max_attempts
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE next_run_at
    UUID item_id
    TEXT last_error
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  METADATA_PROPOSALS {
    external_provider provider
    VARCHAR_255 provider_item_id
    VARCHAR_255 query
    VARCHAR_255 title
    TEXT summary
    VARCHAR_1024 image_url
    JSONB metadata_payload
    VARCHAR_32 status
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }
  ADMIN_AUDIT_LOGS {
    VARCHAR_100 action
    UUID actor_user_id FK
    VARCHAR_320 actor_email
    VARCHAR_64 entity_type
    UUID entity_id
    JSONB details_json
    UUID id PK
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE created_at
    TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIME_ZONE updated_at
  }

tables.name: external_provider_ids
tables.polymorphic_note: Uses entity_type + entity_id as a polymorphic reference; target integrity is enforced in application logic rather than with a single database foreign key.
